channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com

item.title: Hollow Knight: Silksong physical edition announced for PS5, Xbox Series, and Switch 2
item.content:encoded:
• PS5
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

Original Hollow Knight also getting physical editions on PlayStation 5 and Switch 2.

Fangamer has announced a physical edition of Hollow Knight: Silksong for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and Switch 2. It will launch on October 16 for $39 on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series, and $45 on Switch 2. Pre-orders are available now.

The package includes a copy of the game, a reversible cover sheet, 32-page game manual, and mini folded poster. The upcoming expansion “Sea of Sorrow” is not included on the disc / cartridge, but will be available as a free download when it launches.

Additionally, Fangamer has opened pre-orders for physical editions of the original Hollow Knight on PlayStation 5 and Switch 2 for $35 and $39, respectively. These also include a reversible cover sheet, 28-page game manual, and mini folded poster.

Hollow Knight: Silksong is available now digitally for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Switch, and PC via Steam, GOG, Humble Store, and Microsoft Store. It is also available via Game Pass.

The original Hollow Knight is available for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Switch, and PC via Steam and GOG. Physical editions were previously released for PlayStation 4 and Switch.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/hollow-knight-silksong-physical-edition-announced-for-ps5-xbox-series-and-switch-2
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
